message:
Inline wrapDoc into buildDocRoot, fix GC generation leak, simplify iterator

- Merge wrapDoc into buildDocRoot (was a thin wrapper, only one call site)
- Fix FinalizationRegistry callback not deleting docGenerations entry
  (caused Map entries to leak for every GC'd document)
- Simplify array iterator: capture target once instead of 7 locals,
  delegate to get() to populate cache (avoids double-resolving)
- Remove unnecessary void keepalive in array handler
- index.ts 896→870 lines (-26)
